name: Suspicious WMIC ActiveScriptEventConsumer Created
description: Detects the creation of an ActiveScriptEventConsumer using WMIC, a technique often employed by attackers for persistence and/or executing malicious scripts. This rule looks for specific command-line arguments within WMIC process creation events.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was created, which should be 'wmic.exe'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute wmic.exe, including 'ActiveScriptEventConsumer' and 'CREATE'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which wmic.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
